notes: Design-time image2 targets for the minimal meeting assistant UI. Runtime currently uses lightweight PNG placeholders so the app remains runnable without extra encoders; replace with WebP files at the same semantic paths when image2 output is available.

assets.image2_prompt: Seamless very light warm paper and frosted grain texture for a professional meeting notes app, almost white, low contrast, no visible illustration, no gradient, no text, no icons.
Extremely subtle monochrome audio waveform and spectrum line texture on warm off-white background, quiet enterprise tool aesthetic, no neon, no strong contrast, no text.
Minimal abstract document and sound-wave texture for empty state, warm gray paper, sparse fine lines, calm business software tone, no character illustration, no map navigation, no text.
